name: line_gothic_single

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.6 + ADR-0027] The single-line gothic marker この行はゴシック体 (29 corpus occurrences): a zero-width LineGothic marker node — the single-line counterpart of the ゴシック体 compound-indent clause — rendering and setting its line in gothic (a typeface family, distinct from 太字 weight, #435). Serialization is byte-exact. Distinct from the ［＃ゴシック体］ bare block opener and the ［＃「X」はゴシック体］ forward-reference leaf.

source: ［＃この行はゴシック体］本文行

expected.serialize: ［＃この行はゴシック体］本文行
